jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BankBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Frontend Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
